prompt: Create a moody, cinematic square portrait photograph of a Japanese high school girl standing on a narrow wet residential street on a rainy day, viewed from the waist up in side profile facing left. She wears a crisp white short-sleeve school shirt, a dark navy tie or ribbon, a dark pleated skirt, and a black backpack slung behind her. Her straight short black bob haircut is slightly damp. She holds the handle of a transparent vinyl umbrella close to her chest with both hands; the umbrella canopy is open above and behind her, covered in many fine raindrops, with visible pale ribs, a curved clear edge, and a slightly imperfect asymmetrical shape. Her face is intentionally obscured by a flat, centered, soft-edged rectangular censor block in muted brown-gray. The background is softly blurred with shallow depth of field: a rain-slick asphalt road curving into the distance on the left with a white lane line, dark green trees and walls in the distance, and a dense hydrangea bush on the right containing exactly 9 visible blue-to-purple flower clusters among glossy green leaves. Use cool blue-green rainy tones, natural overcast light, film-grain texture, bokeh, realistic wet reflections, and an intimate 35mm street-photography look. Keep the composition square, place the subject slightly right of center, and make the umbrella dominate the upper half of the frame. No text, no watermark, no extra people.
